title: Classic Command Block
description: Changes the Command Block to resemble it's appearance prior to the Combat Update
body:
Small Resource Pack that changes the Command Block to resemble how it looked prior to 15w34a and above.

Not recommended for making well, basically anything that heavily relies on Command Blocks, since it's no longer directional.

This pack is actually an addon from CWSM: Programmer Art Fix! I made it a seperate pack since it became more it's own thing as time went on.
